Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. A tale about fixing eBPF spinlock issues in the Linux kernel 53 upvotes, 1 comments
  2. A Decade of Slug 525 upvotes, 46 comments
  3. Show HN: Fatal Core Dump – A debugging murder mystery played with GDB 48 upvotes, 1 comments
  4. More than 135 open hardware devices flashable with your own firmware 135 upvotes, 11 comments
  5. Mistral AI Releases Forge 251 upvotes, 39 comments
  6. Unsloth Studio 233 upvotes, 49 comments
  7. Show HN: Sub-millisecond VM sandboxes using CoW memory forking 106 upvotes, 19 comments
  8. Kagi Small Web 727 upvotes, 197 comments
  9. Launch HN: Kita (YC W26) – Automate credit review in emerging markets 36 upvotes, 5 comments
  10. Electron microscopy shows 'mouse bite' defects in semiconductors 46 upvotes, 9 comments
  11. Edge.js: Run Node apps inside a WebAssembly sandbox 122 upvotes, 35 comments
  12. Microsoft's 'unhackable' Xbox One has been hacked by 'Bliss' 611 upvotes, 219 comments
  13. Why AI systems don't learn – On autonomous learning from cognitive science 73 upvotes, 22 comments
  14. Launch an autonomous AI agent with sandboxed execution in 2 lines of code 21 upvotes, 4 comments
  15. The pleasures of poor product design 62 upvotes, 20 comments
  16. It Took Me 30 Years to Solve This VFX Problem – Green Screen Problem [video] 209 upvotes, 88 comments
  17. I Simulated 38,612 Countryle Games to Find the Best Strategy 7 upvotes, 0 comments
  18. Python 3.15's JIT is now back on track 325 upvotes, 147 comments
  19. Have a Fucking Website 90 upvotes, 34 comments
  20. OpenSUSE Kalpa 189 upvotes, 83 comments
  21. Get Shit Done: A meta-prompting, context engineering and spec-driven dev system 267 upvotes, 133 comments
  22. Leviathan 22 upvotes, 6 comments
  23. 'The Secret Agent': Exploring a Vibrant, yet Violent Brazil (2025) 138 upvotes, 68 comments
  24. Show HN: I built an interactive 3D three-body problem simulator in the browser 42 upvotes, 16 comments
  25. Ryugu asteroid samples contain all DNA and RNA building blocks 218 upvotes, 120 comments
  26. SSH has no Host header 28 upvotes, 15 comments
  27. Node.js needs a virtual file system 243 upvotes, 215 comments
  28. Arno's Engram Keyboard Layouts 11 upvotes, 7 comments
  29. Forget Flags and Scripts: Just Rename the File 12 upvotes, 10 comments
  30. Honda is killing its EVs 272 upvotes, 567 comments

Last generated 2:00pm, 18 March 2026. Source here.
